steps.title: Identify what must be specified
steps.content: The goal explicitly asks to “specify where” the specimen was identified—the location is the deciding requirement.

steps.title: Find the choice with the location
steps.content: Choice C includes “identified in New Zealand,” the location detail from the notes. The others either name a different species (A), omit the location (B), or describe the concept of Lazarus species without specifying a place (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
